top_stories.title: TinyFish AI Releases Full Web Infrastructure Platform for AI Agents: Search, Fetch, Browser, and Agent Under One API Key
top_stories.description: AI agents struggle with tasks that require interacting with the live web — fetching a competitor’s pricing page, extracting structured data from a JavaScript-heavy dashboard, or automating a multi-step workflow on a real site. The tooling has been fragmented, requiring teams to stitch together separate providers for search, browser automation, and content retrieval. TinyFish, a […] The post TinyFish AI Releases Full Web Infrastructure Platform for AI Agents: Search, Fetch, Browser, and Agent...

top_stories.title: Microsoft named a Leader in The Forrester Wave™ for Sovereign Cloud Platforms
top_stories.description: Microsoft is named a Leader in The Forrester Wave™ for Sovereign Cloud Platforms, recognizing Microsoft Sovereign Cloud leadership in evolving sovereignty needs. The post Microsoft named a Leader in The Forrester Wave™ for Sovereign Cloud Platforms appeared first on Microsoft Azure Blog.

top_stories.title: Navigating the generative AI journey: The Path-to-Value framework from AWS
top_stories.description: In this post, we introduce the Generative AI Path-to-Value (P2V) framework, a structured approach to help you move generative AI initiatives from concept to production and sustained value creation.
top_stories.author: Nitin Eusebius
top_stories.content: In this post, we introduce the Generative AI Path-to-Value (P2V) framework, a structured approach to help you move generative AI initiatives from concept to production and sustained value creation.

top_stories.title: A Step-by-Step Coding Tutorial on NVIDIA PhysicsNeMo: Darcy Flow, FNOs, PINNs, Surrogate Models, and Inference Benchmarking
top_stories.description: In this tutorial, we implement NVIDIA PhysicsNeMo on Colab and build a practical workflow for physics-informed machine learning. We start by setting up the environment, generating data for the 2D Darcy Flow problem, and visualizing the physical fields to clearly understand the learning task. From there, we implement and train powerful models such as the […] The post A Step-by-Step Coding Tutorial on NVIDIA PhysicsNeMo: Darcy Flow, FNOs, PINNs, Surrogate Models, and Inference Benchmarking...

top_stories.title: The future of managing agents at scale: AWS Agent Registry now in preview
top_stories.description: Today, we're announcing AWS Agent Registry (preview) in AgentCore, a single place to discover, share, and reuse AI agents, tools, and agent skills across your enterprise.
top_stories.author: Preethi C N
top_stories.content: Today, we're announcing AWS Agent Registry (preview) in AgentCore, a single place to discover, share, and reuse AI agents, tools, and agent skills across your enterprise.
